title: Software Update - DFU -  Complete screen
scenario: Firmware update via Device Settings > Software Update shows "Update complete" screen with 100% progress bar and successful completion message, then returns to home screen on tapping Close
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the desired device name to open Device Settings.
If an update is available, tap 'Update' to begin the firmware update process.
Wait for the firmware update to complete.
Observe the screen after the update finishes.
expected: The "Update complete" screen is displayed with the progress bar at 100% and a message indicating the software update for the device name has successfully completed. Tapping "Close" returns the user to the Home screen.
